name: Rigatoni w Three Cheeses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large pot of boiling salted water, add the rigatoni and cook until al dente as it is going into the oven. Drain and rinse in cold water.
3. In a large bowl, mix the butter into the pasta until well coated. Add the three cheeses and cream. Toss well and add half the Parmigiano cheese while tossing.
4. Place the mixture in a buttered casserole dish and sprinkle the remaining Parmigiano cheese on top. Sprinkle nutmeg over everything.
5. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the top of the pasta turns golden brown.
